script:
cat > /tmp/strip-recursion.py << 'PYEOF'
import re, sys
F = sys.argv[1]
src = open(F).read()
pattern = re.compile(r'^def _post_reply_orig_protect\(chat_id, text\):\n    return _post_reply_orig_protect\(chat_id, _redact_passwords_protect\(text\)\)\n', re.MULTILINE)
fixed, n = pattern.subn('', src)
open(F, 'w').write(fixed)
print(f'  removed {n} bad definition(s)')
PYEOF
TS=$(date +%s); for B in emily-claude neil-claude stephanie-claude; do F=/home/azureuser/${B}-responder.py; echo "========== $B =========="; BEFORE=$(grep -c '^def _post_reply_orig_protect' $F); echo "  before: $BEFORE definitions"; cp -f $F $F.bak-recursion-$TS; python3 /tmp/strip-recursion.py $F; AFTER=$(grep -c '^def _post_reply_orig_protect' $F); echo "  after:  $AFTER definitions"; if [ "$AFTER" = "1" ]; then sudo systemctl restart ${B}-responder.service && echo "  restarted: $(systemctl is-active ${B}-responder.service)"; else echo "  >>> EDIT FAILED — restoring backup"; cp -f $F.bak-recursion-$TS $F; fi; echo; done
